---
agent: agent
description: Generate a complete HLD System Design Case Study from an architecture diagram.
---

An architecture diagram has been added to the new Case Studies directory.

Before generating any content:

1. Analyze the architecture diagram thoroughly and identify every major component, data flow, communication pattern, and architectural decision.
2. Read existing HLD case studies in the repository to understand the writing style, structure, terminology, and level of detail.
3. Follow all repository and System Design instruction files.

Then create a new Markdown case study for the system represented by the diagram.

Requirements:

- Use the architecture diagram as the primary source of truth, but expand it with production-grade reasoning wherever appropriate.
- Explain why each component exists, not just what it does.
- Fill in missing implementation details using widely accepted production practices without contradicting the diagram.
- Do not fabricate company-specific architectures or undocumented implementation details.
